description: STM32G4 MCU candidate with motor-control-friendly timers, ADCs, DSP/FPU, and FDCAN
notes: Exact package can change with IO count, debug connector, and board size

description: MOTIX smart 3-phase gate driver for battery-powered BLDC/PMSM motor drives with SPI configuration and fault reporting
notes: Digi-Key active/in-stock; good fit for 24V M3508-class BLDC actuator axis, final current and switching frequency still TBD

description: 60V OptiMOS power MOSFET, 1.2 mOhm max RDS(on), used in 6EDL7141 36V/1kW evaluation design
notes: Digi-Key active/in-stock; use 6 for single MOSFET per switch and evaluate 12 for first joint, shoulder, and other high-current axes

description: Low-ohm current sense resistor for PWM-synchronous three-phase current measurement
notes: Required for sensor-based FOC; value and power rating depend on current range and ADC amplifier gain

description: Coreless magnetic current sensor, 25A class, analog output and fast overcurrent outputs
notes: Digi-Key active/in-stock; use for protection/logging on lower-current axes and choose either TLE4971 or TLE4973 per axis

description: 5V coreless current sensor with +/-82A range, analog output, overcurrent output, and diagnostics
notes: Infineon official site confirmed; use for protection/logging on first joint, shoulder, and other high-current axes, choose either TLE4971 or TLE4973 per axis

description: 360 degree GMR angle sensor with SPI-compatible SSC interface and diagnostic functions
notes: Digi-Key active/in-stock; mount on actuator output axis when possible, motor-side sensor can be added separately

description: CAN FD SIC transceiver usable for initial CAN 1Mbps and future CAN FD expansion
notes: Digi-Key active/in-stock; use with termination option, TVS, and wiring policy shared with rover CAN bus

description: Multiple-output PMIC for 3.3V MCU supply, transceiver/sensor supply, watchdog, and reset monitoring
notes: Digi-Key active/in-stock; 6EDL7141 includes regulators, but TLF35584 is useful if watchdog/reset supervision is prioritized

description: NTC thermistor or equivalent temperature sensor near MOSFET hot spot
notes: Required for derating and over-temperature fault

description: NTC thermistor or equivalent temperature sensor on motor case
notes: Required for motor thermal protection; winding temperature can be added if motor supports it

description: Resistor divider and filter for 24V bus voltage measurement by STM32 ADC
notes: Set resistor values for ADC range, input leakage, and noise filtering

description: Fuse or resettable protection for each joint actuator input
notes: Rating depends on motor current and PDU arm rail protection strategy

description: TVS diode, reverse protection, and input filtering for 24V actuator rail
notes: Coordinate with PDU switching behavior and cable inductance

description: Electrolytic and ceramic capacitors for motor inverter DC bus
notes: Capacitance and ripple current depend on motor current and cable length

description: Connector for 24V and GND input to joint actuator
notes: Current rating and locking mechanism depend on joint load

description: Connector for U/V/W motor phases and optional motor temperature lines
notes: May be omitted if motor wires are soldered directly

description: Connector for CANH, CANL, GND, and optional shield
notes: Use two connectors if daisy-chain wiring is preferred

description: 120 ohm termination option, TVS, common-mode choke, connector passives
notes: Only bus end nodes should enable termination

description: RoboMaster M3508-class 24V BLDC motor for actuator axis drive
notes: Use M3508-class motor as the baseline; final exact model, current, Kv, pole pairs, and sensor interface remain open

description: Cycloidal reducer matched to actuator torque and speed; first joint baseline is 1:120
notes: First joint target is about 300 N*m rated, 600 N*m peak, 3.9 rpm output; other axes are selected per load

description: SWD connector or pads for STM32 programming and debug
notes: Use existing ARES debug connector convention if available

item: Gate, sense, filter, and pull resistor set
description: Gate resistors, bootstrap parts, sense filters, pull resistors, decoupling, and small passives
notes: Values depend on layout, MOSFET choice, and 6EDL7141 configuration
